scripts.release:js:patch: npm --prefix packages/js version patch --no-git-tag-version && V=$(node -p "require('./packages/js/package.json').version") && git add packages/js/package.json && git commit -m "chore: release @claviscore/days v$V" && git tag js/v$V && git push && git push origin js/v$V
scripts.release:js:minor: npm --prefix packages/js version minor --no-git-tag-version && V=$(node -p "require('./packages/js/package.json').version") && git add packages/js/package.json && git commit -m "chore: release @claviscore/days v$V" && git tag js/v$V && git push && git push origin js/v$V
scripts.release:js:major: npm --prefix packages/js version major --no-git-tag-version && V=$(node -p "require('./packages/js/package.json').version") && git add packages/js/package.json && git commit -m "chore: release @claviscore/days v$V" && git tag js/v$V && git push && git push origin js/v$V
